$comment: Shared TS<->Python parity corpus for the Reg-Z + UDAAP rate-claim checker (DRAFT, warn-only). Each case is run through BOTH the TS scanRateClaims (via node) and the Python scan_rate_claims; the sorted (token, severity, index) tuples MUST be identical. Mirrors the lane parity discipline. Add a case here and BOTH languages must agree.
